    F

    FileHandler - Class in jogo.io
    Handles all file input and output operations for saving and loading game sessions.
    FileHandler() - Constructor for class jogo.io.FileHandler
     
    FileHandler.SaveData - Class in jogo.io
    Container class used to securely encapsulate and return the parsed game data upon a successful load operation.
    FileHandlerTest - Class in io
     
    FileHandlerTest() - Constructor for class io.FileHandlerTest
     
    FOOD - Enum constant in enum class jogo.models.ResourceType
    Represents food supplies required for daily structure maintenance and population.
    Forest - Class in jogo.models.Structures
    Represents a Forest structure in the game world.
    Forest(Player, int) - Constructor for class jogo.models.Structures.Forest
    Constructs a new Forest structure, initializing its base resource yields, cost constraints, and placing it under the specified player's ownership.
    FOREST - Enum constant in enum class jogo.models.Structures.StructuresType
    Represents a wood-producing forestry installation.
    ForestTest - Class in models.Structures
    Test class for the Forest class.
    ForestTest() - Constructor for class models.Structures.ForestTest
